message:
feat(algorithms,python): add Tutte polynomial, stochastic block model, partial duplication, relaxed caveman generators, and Graph/MultiGraph.to_directed()

Algorithms (+75 lines):
- tutte_polynomial: deletion-contraction Tutte polynomial evaluation T(G;x,y)
  (exponential time, exact). Uses recursive edge classification (loop, bridge,
  ordinary) with graph cloning at each step.
- stochastic_block_model: planted partition random graph with LCG RNG. Accepts
  block sizes and inter-block probability matrix.
- partial_duplication_graph: growth model where new nodes randomly duplicate
  edges of an existing node with probability p.
- relaxed_caveman_graph: l cliques of size k with random inter-clique rewiring.

Python bindings:
- Graph.to_directed() now returns a PyDiGraph with both (u→v) and (v→u) edges
  per undirected edge, preserving all node/edge/graph attributes. Previously
  raised NetworkXNotImplemented.
- MultiGraph.to_directed() now returns a PyMultiDiGraph with bidirectional
  edges and full attribute preservation. Previously raised
  NetworkXNotImplemented.
- test_e2e_smoke updated: to_directed() assertion now verifies directed copy
  has 2x edges instead of expecting an exception.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -308,8 +308,10 @@ def test_multigraph_extended_surface(fnx):
     assert isinstance(same_kind, fnx.MultiGraph)
     assert same_kind.number_of_edges("a", "b") == 2
 
-    with pytest.raises(fnx.NetworkXNotImplemented):
-        g.to_directed()
+    directed_graph = g.to_directed()
+    assert isinstance(directed_graph, fnx.MultiDiGraph)
+    assert directed_graph.is_directed()
+    assert directed_graph.number_of_edges() == 2 * g.number_of_edges()
 
     g.update(edges=[("b", "c", {"weight": 4.0})], nodes=[("d", {"shape": "square"})])
     assert g.has_node("d")
